full_text:
Li Kan 李堪
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Kan (李堪). One of Han Sui’s Eight Knights. Accidentally killed by Yu Jin’s arrow. Li Kan was affiliated with the Han Sui Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom. Li Kan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
